## Screenshots

Attach screenshots for UI changes, or write "not applicable".

## Documentation

- [ ] README / docs updated where needed
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated where needed
- [ ] No unsupported release binary or installer claim was added

## Safety Checklist

- [ ] No hardware write functionality was added
- [ ] No HID write, `send_feature_report`, output report, or save/apply/sync-to-device behavior was added
- [ ] No keyboard configuration read/write command was added
- [ ] No key remapping, RGB, rapid trigger, SOCD, or macro editor was added unless explicitly in scope
- [ ] No firmware flashing or calibration was added
- [ ] No cloud sync, user account, remote upload, or database feature was added unless explicitly in scope
- [ ] No Electron wrapper or embedded AJAZZ website was added
